# Bag of Preparation

## Description

- At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with opening energy relics such as Very Hot Cocoa: extra starting cards make it easier to convert the bonus energy into setup powers, burst attacks, draw, and block.
